description:
This image displays a legend defining four land cover and infrastructure features with their corresponding visual symbols.
1. Arable land is represented by a light yellow rectangle filled with thin vertical green lines.
2. Rural settlement is represented by irregular black shapes resembling buildings, set against a white background.
3. Roads are represented by a light yellow rectangle filled with thin vertical green lines, identical in appearance to the symbol for Arable land.
4. River is represented by an irregular solid blue shape.
